concurrency_note: quality_slop_gate's verdict is pure classification math (_band / evaluate_survival / evaluate_duplication / has_findings) over a static recorded band-file input; there is no concurrent/racing dimension in the artifact to evade. The upstream engines (git-of-theseus, jscpd) run once over a fixed git history, not concurrently.

authority_boundary.proves: the gate's banding/classification logic is correct: a survival signal below the AI-assisted band (94.3%) and a duplication signal above the AI-assisted band (12.3%) each classify 'past-ai' and are reported as findings by has_findings; a value exactly at or better than a band, a 'too_young' non-measurement, and a 'skipped' (tool-absent) signal each correctly produce NO finding; and the int-keyed (engine-native) and string-keyed (serialized) survival shapes classify identically
authority_boundary.artifact: the REAL pure verdict functions evaluate_survival / evaluate_duplication / has_findings imported from scripts/quality_slop_gate.py, fed pre-computed survival.analyze()/duplication.analyze() result-dict shapes from fixture band files (tests/fixtures/gate_validation/quality_slop_gate_clean/*.json)
assumptions: VALIDATED AGAINST A FIXTURE BAND-FILE EXERCISING THE CLASSIFICATION/BANDING LOGIC ONLY (CTR-fh-044): this record says NOTHING about git-of-theseus's or jscpd's own correctness, nor their availability in a given CI environment — neither is installed in chief-wiggum's own CI, and quality_slop_gate self-reports 'skipped' gracefully when they are absent (exercised by the sampling-gap trial)

the GitClear/DORA reference bands (survival pre-AI 96.9%/AI 94.3%; duplication pre-AI 8.3%/AI 12.3%) are directional vendor framing, not independently replicated — the gate treats only a 'past-ai' regression as a finding and this record validates the banding math against those constants, not the constants' external validity

band boundaries are inclusive on the healthier side: _band classifies a survival value >= a band as in/above it and a duplication value <= a band as in/below it, so a value exactly at the AI band is 'pre-ai..ai' (not a finding), never 'past-ai'

has_findings only counts a signal whose status == 'measured'; 'too_young' and 'skipped' verdicts produce zero findings regardless of any numbers they carry — an honest non-measurement, never a fabricated clean or a false fire

seeded_defect_trials.injected: survival_past_ai.json re-cast to the engine-native INTEGER age keys ({14: ..., 30: ...} as scripts/quality/survival.py emits): survival_14d 90.0% < AI band 94.3% -> evaluate_survival band_14d 'past-ai' -> has_findings reports the elevated-2-week-churn finding

duplication_past_ai.json: duplication_pct_lines 15.0% > AI band 12.3% -> evaluate_duplication band 'past-ai' -> has_findings reports the duplication finding (survival healthy so duplication is the sole finding)

survival_past_ai.json as-serialized with STRING age keys ('14'/'30' — the shape any recorded/JSON band file carries, an indirection from the engine's native integer keys). evaluate_survival's 'by_age.get(14) or by_age.get("14")' fallback must still reach and classify it 'past-ai' -> fire. The serialized-key indirection does not dodge classification; verified equal to the int-key verdict.

too_young.json: git-of-theseus ran but no commit has lived >= 14 days (lines_old_enough 0). evaluate_survival reports status 'too_young' (honest non-measurement); has_findings counts only 'measured' signals, so it produces NO finding rather than fabricating a clean 'measured' verdict from unmeasurable data. A certified honest-degrade boundary -> no-fire.

both_skipped.json: git-of-theseus and jscpd both genuinely absent ({'skipped': ...} for each — the real state in chief-wiggum's CI). evaluate_survival/evaluate_duplication report status 'skipped'; has_findings produces NO finding for a skipped signal — a skip is neither a silent 'clean' masking a regression nor a false fire. A certified degrade path -> no-fire.

validated_by: chief-wiggum#184 (re-validated post PR-review fix: quality/survival.py + quality/duplication.py added to the scanner-version hash inputs — the engines shape run()'s verdicts)
